_comment.1: STANDALONE aylp_alsa smoke test -- no camera, no FSM. Feeds a 2-vector
_comment.2: sine (MINMAX) straight into the soundcard to confirm hw:0,0 accepts
_comment.3: 48 kHz / S16_LE / MMAP_INTERLEAVED and reports its buffer/period sizes.
_comment.4: Outputs an audible/measurable ~1 kHz tone on both line-out channels.
_comment.5: Run with `-l trace` to see the snd_pcm_dump. MEASURED on this host: the
_comment.6: onboard ALC3234 (hw:0,0) supports ONLY 44100/48000 Hz -- NOT 192 kHz --
_comment.7: so 192000 clamps to 48000 (a warn). 48 kHz is still far above the FSM
_comment.8: control band, so it is fine; request 48000 to avoid the resample.
